tasks.prompt: Read the file `docs/PLAN.md` in the project. Check if there are any new phase completions, blockers, or important updates since the last review. Report a brief summary (under 100 words) of anything noteworthy — new TODOs, progress highlights, or items needing attention. If nothing changed, reply "No changes in PLAN.md."

Run `git status` and `git diff --stat` in the project. If there are uncommitted changes, create a commit with a descriptive message summarizing what changed. Use `git add` with specific files (not `git add -A`). Only commit if there are actual changes. Reply with the commit message or "No changes to commit."
